heading: Regulation of trade
label: 1416 Regulation of trade
text: The introduction of guano from such islands, rocks, or keys shall be regulated as in the coasting trade between different parts of the United States, and the same laws shall govern the vessels concerned therein.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 5575 derived from , .act Aug. 18, 1856, ch. 164, § 311 Stat. 120
amendments: CodificationR.S. § 5575 derived from , .act Aug. 18, 1856, ch. 164, § 311 Stat. 120
